message:
feat(opentui): comprehensive terminal rendering and input handling expansion

Major enhancements to the OpenTUI terminal UI framework, adding advanced
buffer manipulation, input parsing, and rendering capabilities for building
sophisticated terminal applications.

## Demo Showcase (src/bin/demo_showcase.rs) [+847 lines]
- Expanded interactive demonstration of all TUI components
- Added multi-panel layout demonstrations
- Implemented animation and transition examples
- Added styling showcase with all available themes

## Buffer System
### Opacity Handling (src/buffer/opacity.rs) [+244 lines, NEW]
- Implemented per-cell opacity for layered UI composition
- Added alpha blending between overlapping buffer regions
- Implemented opacity interpolation for smooth transitions
- Added configurable blend modes (normal, multiply, screen, overlay)

### Scissor Regions (src/buffer/scissor.rs) [+328 lines, NEW]
- Implemented rectangular clipping regions for render optimization
- Added nested scissor stack for hierarchical clipping
- Implemented efficient dirty region tracking
- Added scissor debugging visualization mode

## Color System (src/color.rs) [+463 lines]
- Expanded color space support (sRGB, linear RGB, HSL, HSV, LAB)
- Implemented color interpolation for smooth gradients
- Added color contrast ratio calculation for accessibility
- Implemented WCAG 2.1 contrast compliance checking
- Added color palette generation utilities

## Input Handling (src/input/parser.rs) [+214 lines]
- Enhanced ANSI escape sequence parsing
- Added support for extended mouse protocols (SGR, URXVT)
- Implemented bracketed paste mode detection
- Added focus tracking event parsing
- Improved key modifier detection

## Renderer (src/renderer/mod.rs) [+235 lines]
- Optimized diff-based rendering for reduced terminal writes
- Added double-buffering support for flicker-free updates
- Implemented smart cursor movement optimization
- Added batched write coalescing

## Terminal Capabilities
### Cursor (src/terminal/cursor.rs) [+213 lines]
- Implemented cursor shape control (block, underline, bar)
- Added cursor blinking control
- Implemented cursor visibility management
- Added cursor position save/restore stack

### Mouse (src/terminal/mouse.rs) [+312 lines]
- Implemented comprehensive mouse event handling
- Added drag detection with configurable thresholds
- Implemented scroll wheel support (including horizontal)
- Added mouse capture mode for modal interactions

## Text Editing (src/text/edit.rs) [+193 lines]
- Enhanced text buffer manipulation operations
- Added multi-cursor editing support
- Implemented clipboard integration hooks
- Added undo/redo operation framework

## Testing (tests/proptest_text_unicode.rs) [NEW]
- Added property-based tests for Unicode text handling
- Implemented grapheme cluster boundary testing
- Added width calculation verification tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
